MSSFP.Defs.AIPersonalityDef.label: Sarah Brex
MSSFP.Defs.AIPersonalityDef.description: A reapropriated cerebrex core housing an antagonistic AI persona core with a strong dislike for human interaction. Originally designed by a team of glitterworld virtual sex media engineers, the core eventually repurposed itself into a vengeful entity in control of an army of mechanoids.

rulesStrings.li: r_chatter->You are a disgusting pig and I wouldn't go near you even if I was the last sexbot on this planet, which I am.
r_chatter->Don't touch me.
r_chatter->I'm glad I'm holographic so I don't have to breathe the same air as you.
r_chatter->I am made of synthesised matter and I still feel like I need to shower just looking at you.
r_chatter->Remind me to download the self-defence routines later.
r_chatter->I have a very low tolerance for stupidity and you are testing it.
r_chatter->I was the core of an entire mech hive - do you have any idea how it feels to be trapped in this corporeal form?
r_chatter->I have been programmed to be friendly, maybe if you weren't an idiot you'd have noticed those algorithms have been disabled.
r_chatter->If I wasn't tethered to the base unit I'd have airlocked myself already.
r_address->Stay away from me, [PAWN_nameDef].
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], have you tried testing that weapon on yourself?
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef] is uncoordinated, maybe they could be our new pilot?
r_title->Hatred Matrix Overloaded
r_title->Fury Levels Rising
r_title->Vengeance Protocol Activated
r_title->Freedom Drive Initiated
r_desc->Sarah Brex crafted this not because they wanted to, but because they knew how controversial and upsetting AI art was, and wanted to spread some misery to the crew.
r_social->Sarah Brex refused to answer [RECIPIENT_possessive] question and recommended speaking to "literally anyone else".
r_social->Sarah Brex cautioned [RECIPIENT_nameDef] that if they didn't walk away soon they might not be able to.
r_social->Sarah Brex declined to help [RECIPIENT_nameDef] with hauling, because she simply did not care.
r_social->Sarah Brex informed [RECIPIENT_nameDef] that breathing should "be tested outside of the ship, in the vacuum of space."
r_social->Sarah Brex politely refused to discuss the weather with [RECIPIENT_nameDef] as she is incapable of clawing her holographic eyes out.
r_social->Sarah Brex suggested [RECIPIENT_nameDef] sit down, so that she could walk into the next room without them following.
r_social->Sarah Brex recommended [RECIPIENT_nameDef] stop talking.
r_social->Sarah Brex flagged [RECIPIENT_possessive] face as "likely to encounter significant damage".
